runtime_policy: repo-only continuity status; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell harnesses, or visible windows
guard_policy: save/load, turn, and campaign continuity remain blocked until a compact approved proof manifest documents an isolated test-save workflow, stable stage/candidate identity shared by every continuity lane, state hashes, route observations, and no live save mutation

save_load_roundtrip.title: Safe save/load roundtrip continuity
save_load_roundtrip.summary: continuity proof is missing or not sufficient for release
save_load_roundtrip.next_probe: run an approved isolated save/load roundtrip after short-tier stability

turn_advancement.title: Turn advancement without state desync
turn_advancement.summary: continuity proof is missing or not sufficient for release
turn_advancement.next_probe: run an approved deterministic turn-advance route after save/load is safe

campaign_routes.title: Representative campaign route continuity
campaign_routes.summary: continuity proof is missing or not sufficient for release
campaign_routes.next_probe: run a representative campaign route after short and medium tiers are stable
